content:
And so he talks about how your voids from your childhood are things that you think you are missing are going to determine your values now.

And so figuring out your values now, i.e. Taking full responsibility for where you are right now through the 13 questions. Then you start to move back to that carrying fair exchange, not to careful not to careless, right?

And so his example he gave was he was like, when I started being an entrepreneur, I told everyone I was an entrepreneur, and that's what I did.

And that.

Right.

T be you a successful business owner, you have to be organized and yada, yada, and have all of the values, right?

And he was like, if I look at your bank account and your calendar, I can tell you what you value.

And, he was like, so I saw down, and I answered the questions and I realized that I was being super, super hard on myself because I wasn't achieving the stuff I wanted in the business.

But I had all of the values that I needed to be a good business owner.
